appraisal_events.evidence: Seule elle avait des racines dans son coeur… Par elle, il était capable de souffrir… il fallait la tenir par l'attente du lendemain… il supposait que peut-être elle ne l'aimait pas… elle ne restât avec lui qu'à cause de son argent… un cadeau… trente mille francs.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents Robert as emotionally dependent on his mistress, willing to spend and strategize to keep her, and convinced that she might not love him and stay for his money. This dependence diminishes him locally.

status_effects.explanation: Robert appears submissive and anxious, centered on his mistress to the detriment of everything else, and acting out of fear of losing her.
